caption:
What if the softest thing you wore this spring also carried the colour of the sea?

There is something almost weightless about this time of year — the island exhaling, the light returning, everything feeling a little more possible. This poncho moves the way the season does: gently, openly, with quiet confidence. Shades of teal and slate that feel less like a colour choice and more like a mood.

Poncho: @mirrorintheskycashmere
